cursor.standing: VALIDATIONS, its first consumer, moved out to beside-code git-JSON (cairn/tester/validation_store.py, charter-state-history-split child b), leaving db_domain holding only genuinely relational / graph-tree state.

window.standing: Born as the fourth step of the code spine (base, base pair, tester, db_domain) and the second real device — the sole path to Postgres 5432, its connection identity (peer auth, Unix socket, dedicated `cairn` database, vault deferred) ratified by Akien.

PROVED for the store physics: peer-auth connect reaches `cairn`, an ownerless table is refused, an owned table records its owner, non-owner and unowned-table writes are refused (Law 6), and an owned jsonb row round-trips as structure — proven under the tester, self-cleaning.

VALIDATIONS, its first consumer, moved out to beside-code git-JSON (cairn/tester/validation_store.py, charter-state-history-split child b), leaving db_domain holding only genuinely relational / graph-tree state.
